mechanism_narrative: Persistently low and stable FEDFUNDS near the zero lower bound reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, sustaining a positive drift in S&P 500 prices over the next month as investors reach for yield in risk assets.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d SPX return stays below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or returns during low-rate periods are not significantly higher than the full-sample mean (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE declines by more than 0.3 percentage points over a rolling 3-month window, it signals accelerating labor market healing that boosts consumer income expectations and corporate earnings outlooks, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Triggered episodes show forward 60d returns not statistically different from non-triggered baseline (p > 0.05), or negative returns occur in more than 45% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in HOUST and RSAFS indicates a broadening of consumer and residential investment demand that jointly signals durable economic expansion, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month; neither series alone carries the same predictive power because housing and retail can diverge during uneven recoveries.
failure_condition: Joint-trigger episodes fail to outperform single-series signals in forward 20d return prediction (incremental Rank IC <= 0), or joint signal underperforms baseline SPX drift in over 50% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-recession recovery regime, sustained month-over-month increases in INDPRO reflect rebuilding industrial capacity and inventory restocking, which supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent quarter; this relationship is muted or reversed in late-cycle regimes where industrial growth signals overheating.
evidence_refs: fact:economy exiting 2008-2009 recession with low capacity utilization
failure_condition: INDPRO trend fails to positively predict forward 60d SPX returns in recovery-regime subsample (Rank IC < 0.03), or effect is not distinguishable from late-cycle subsample coefficient.

mechanism_narrative: A rising trend in PAYEMS reflects continuous net job creation, which supports household income and near-term consumption, generating a modest positive drift in S&P 500 returns over the following trading week as markets incrementally price in improving fundamentals.
failure_condition: Rank IC between PAYEMS month-over-month change and forward 5d SPX return remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS rises above 4.5%, it signals a monetary tightening cycle that raises the cost of capital and discount rates on future equity earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month as valuations compress.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS exceeds the 4.5% threshold, invalidating the tightening-drag mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: In a near-zero interest rate regime, month-over-month growth in RSAFS has an amplified positive effect on near-term equity returns because cheap financing magnifies the earnings impact of incremental consumer spending, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next trading week.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS near historic lows in late 2010
failure_condition: RSAFS growth fails to show stronger correlation with forward 5d returns during low-rate regime versus historical average regime (difference in Rank IC not statistically significant).

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of declining UNRATE alongside rising PAYEMS constitutes a stronger confirmation of genuine labor market tightening than either series alone, since PAYEMS growth could occur despite flat unemployment due to labor force re-entry; when both align favorably, S&P 500 returns are positive over the following quarter, reflecting reduced macro uncertainty.
failure_condition: Combined-trigger episodes do not outperform single-indicator triggers in forward 60d return Rank IC, or joint-signal hit rate for positive returns falls below 50%.
